summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All 'Expense For Branch' cross-branch expense features verified working: 1) 'Expense For Branch' dropdown visible in Add Expense form with 'Same as Paid From' default, 2) Creating cross-branch expense with different Paid From and Expense For branches works, 3) 'All Expenses' tab shows 'Expense For' column, 4) Dashboard 'Branch-to-Branch Dues' section shows expense-based dues like 'A paid for b (expense)', 5) Backend APIs /api/expenses with expense_for_branch_id and /api/reports/branch-dues-net work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with SSC@SSC.com/Aa147258369SsC@ returns access_token
Backend: Branches A and b exist (d805e6cb-f65a-4a09-8707-95f3f5e505bf and 4ea291a5-c3e4-4067-8437-2121f3c12882)
Backend: POST /api/expenses with expense_for_branch_id creates cross-branch expense
Backend: GET /api/expenses returns expense_for_branch_id field in response
Backend: GET /api/reports/branch-dues returns expense-based cross-branch dues
Backend: GET /api/reports/branch-dues-net returns dues, paybacks, total_dues, total_paybacks
Backend: Empty string expense_for_branch_id is converted to null
Backend: Same-branch expense (null expense_for_branch_id) works correctly
Frontend: Expenses page has 'Expense For Branch' dropdown visible
Frontend: 'Expense For Branch' dropdown has data-testid='expense-for-branch'
Frontend: 'Expense For Branch' dropdown shows 'Same as Paid From' default
Frontend: 'Expense For Branch' dropdown shows branches OTHER than selected 'Paid From' branch
Frontend: 'All Expenses' tab shows 'Expense For' column in table header
Frontend: Cross-branch expense shows branch name in 'Expense For' column
Frontend: Dashboard 'Branch-to-Branch Dues' section shows expense-based dues
Frontend: 'A paid for b (expense)' entry appears with correct amount SAR 500.00
critical_code_review_comments: Expense model correctly has expense_for_branch_id: Optional[str] = None field
ExpenseCreate model correctly has expense_for_branch_id: Optional[str] = None field
Backend create_expense endpoint correctly converts empty string to null for expense_for_branch_id
Branch dues calculation at /api/reports/branch-dues correctly handles expense_for_branch_id cross-branch logic
Frontend ExpensesPage.jsx correctly filters Expense For Branch dropdown to exclude currently selected Paid From branch
Frontend All Expenses table correctly shows 'Expense For' column with branch name badge
seed_data_creation: Test expense 'TEST_A_pays_for_b' created and cleaned up during testing. Cross-branch expenses created via backend tests also cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 complete. 'Expense For Branch' feature fully tested: 1) ExpensesPage.jsx has 'Expense For Branch' dropdown (data-testid='expense-for-branch') next to 'Paid From (Branch)' dropdown, 2) When 'Paid From' branch is selected, 'Expense For' dropdown filters out that branch and shows only other branches, 3) Default value is 'Same as Paid From' which sends null to API, 4) Backend endpoint POST /api/expenses accepts expense_for_branch_id and stores it correctly, 5) GET /api/reports/branch-dues and /api/reports/branch-dues-net correctly calculate expense-based cross-branch dues showing 'X paid for Y (expense)' entries, 6) Dashboard Branch-to-Branch Dues card shows expense-based dues with correct amounts. Branch IDs: A=d805e6cb-f65a-4a09-8707-95f3f5e505bf, b=4ea291a5-c3e4-4067-8437-2121f3c12882.
